TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv_Donald_John_Trump, title = Donald_John_Trump, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Seediq]}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/wiki/Donald_John_Trump} }

S.FORM: = Donald John Trump = Mntucing hngkawas 1946 idas 6 jiyax 14 ka Donald John Trump ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Puerto rico ta sayang o kiya ka Donald John Trump, pnaah hngkawas 2017 idas 1 jiyax 20 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. His presidential term ended on January 20, 2021. == Pnyahan pnatas ==
S.PHON: = donald ɟoħn tɾump = mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax ** ka donald ɟoħn tɾump ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan puəɾto ɾiʦo ta sajaŋ o kija ka donald ɟoħn tɾump, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax ** pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan. ħis pɾəsidəntial təɾm əndəd on ɟanuaɾj **, ****. == pnjaħan pnatas ==
S.FORM: = Donald John Trump = Mntucing hngkawas 1946 idas 6 jiyax 14 ka Donald John Trump ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Puerto rico ta sayang o kiya ka Donald John Trump, pnaah hngkawas 2017 idas 1 jiyax 20 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. His presidential term ended on January 20, 2021. == Pnyahan pnatas ==
S.PHON: = donald ɟoħn tɾump = mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax ** ka donald ɟoħn tɾump ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan puəɾto ɾiʦo ta sajaŋ o kija ka donald ɟoħn tɾump, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax ** pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan. ħis pɾəsidəntial təɾm əndəd on ɟanuaɾj **, ****. == pnjaħan pnatas ==
